Thanks for the survey and geotech. CivilFlow can provide **concept stormwater strategy** for the Chen site:

**Scope:**
- On-site detention sizing desktop (Ku-ring-gai DCP Chapter B13)
- Downstream pipe capacity check against council mapping
- Concept OSD location options given 2.1 m fall and south boundary sewer easement
- One revision and conference with architect

**Fee:** $4,850 + GST
**Programme:** 10 business days from instruction and survey receipt

**Preliminary observation:** Rear yard low point favours underground OSD tank east of garage; overflow to street kerb may need council hydraulic approval ÔÇö we'll confirm in report.

Let me know if owners want us appointed.

Kate Morrison
Principal, CivilFlow Hydraulic Consultants

**Harrison Clarke Studio Pty Ltd**
ABN 81 234 567 890
Level 2, 18 Pacific Highway, St Leonards NSW 2065
Tel: (02) 9437 2200 | enquiries@harrisonclarke.com.au

14 May 2026

Michael and Sarah Chen
14 Wattle Grove
Lindfield NSW 2070

Dear Michael and Sarah,

**Re: Architect and Project Management Services ÔÇö Chen Residence, 14 Wattle Grove, Lindfield**

Thank you for accepting our fee proposal dated 28 April 2026. This letter confirms your engagement of Harrison Clarke Studio Pty Ltd (**HCS**) to provide architect and project management services for the proposed new dwelling at 14 Wattle Grove, Lindfield (**the Project**).

## Appointment

HCS is appointed as **architect and project manager** to act on your behalf in the design, authority approval, consultant coordination, builder procurement, and contract administration phases of the Project. HCS is **not** appointed as Superintendent, Certifier, or builder unless separately agreed in writing.

## Scope of services

Our services comprise:

1. Concept and schematic design through to DA lodgement
2. Design development and construction documentation
3. Consultant briefing, appointment support, and coordination
4. Authority and certifier liaison (BASIX, Ku-ring-gai Council, principal certifier)
5. Head builder procurement ÔÇö preparation of tender documentation, evaluation of **two to three** invited builders, and a written recommendation to you
6. Contract administration during construction to practical completion, excluding Superintendent functions under the head contract unless later varied
7. Monthly owner progress reporting and milestone advice

**Exclusions** unless separately agreed: interior design beyond joinery schedule coordination; landscape design (we will brief a landscape consultant if required); geotechnical, survey, and specialist reports (we will coordinate appointments); extra tender rounds beyond one formal head-builder tender; legal advice.

## Fee basis

Fixed professional fee: **$148,500 excluding GST** ($163,350 incl. GST), staged as follows:

| Stage | Trigger | Fee (ex GST) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Mobilisation & concept | Engagement signed | $22,000 |
| Schematic & DA package | DA-ready issue | $38,500 |
| Design development | DD issue to builder tender | $32,000 |
| Construction documentation | IFC issue | $36,000 |
| Procurement & contract | Executed head contract | $12,000 |
| Construction administration | Monthly ├ù est. 12 months | $8,000 |

Disbursements (printing, couriers, authority fees on your account) billed at cost + 10%.

## Authority and decisions

You retain decision authority on scope, budget, planning pathway, builder selection, and contract execution. HCS will provide recommendations and draft material for your approval. No commitment on your behalf without your written approval except routine consultant coordination within agreed scope.

## Professional indemnity

HCS holds professional indemnity insurance with QBE Australia Ltd, policy PI-NSW-2026-44821, limit $5,000,000 any one claim, period 1 July 2025 to 30 June 2026. Certificate available on request.

## Programme

We will prepare a master programme aligned to the Project Management Plan. Target DA lodgement: **September 2026**, subject to due diligence completion and brief sign-off.

## Execution

Please sign and return one copy. Works commence on receipt of signed engagement and Stage 1 fee invoice.

Yours sincerely,

**Amelia Harrison**
Director, Registered Architect NSW #8432
Harrison Clarke Studio Pty Ltd

---

**ACCEPTED:**

Dear Michael and Sarah,

**Re: Architect and Project Management Services ÔÇö Chen Residence, 14 Wattle Grove, Lindfield**

Thank you for accepting our fee proposal dated 28 April 2026. This letter confirms your engagement of Harrison Clarke Studio Pty Ltd (**HCS**) to provide architect and project management services for the proposed new dwelling at 14 Wattle Grove, Lindfield (**the Project**).

## Appointment

HCS is appointed as **architect and project manager** to act on your behalf in the design, authority approval, consultant coordination, builder procurement, and contract administration phases of the Project. HCS is **not** appointed as Superintendent, Certifier, or builder unless separately agreed in writing.

## Scope of services

Our services comprise:

1. Concept and schematic design through to DA lodgement
2. Design development and construction documentation
3. Consultant briefing, appointment support, and coordination
4. Authority and certifier liaison (BASIX, Ku-ring-gai Council, principal certifier)
5. Head builder procurement ÔÇö preparation of tender documentation, evaluation of **two to three** invited builders, and a written recommendation to you
6. Contract administration during construction to practical completion, excluding Superintendent functions under the head contract unless later varied
7. Monthly owner progress reporting and milestone advice

**Exclusions** unless separately agreed: interior design beyond joinery schedule coordination; landscape design (we will brief a landscape consultant if required); geotechnical, survey, and specialist reports (we will coordinate appointments); extra tender rounds beyond one formal head-builder tender; legal advice.

## Fee basis

Fixed professional fee: **$148,500 excluding GST** ($163,350 incl. GST), staged as follows:

| Stage | Trigger | Fee (ex GST) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Mobilisation & concept | Engagement signed | $22,000 |
| Schematic & DA package | DA-ready issue | $38,500 |
| Design development | DD issue to builder tender | $32,000 |
| Construction documentation | IFC issue | $36,000 |
| Procurement & contract | Executed head contract | $12,000 |
| Construction administration | Monthly ├ù est. 12 months | $8,000 |

Disbursements (printing, couriers, authority fees on your account) billed at cost + 10%.

## Authority and decisions

You retain decision authority on scope, budget, planning pathway, builder selection, and contract execution. HCS will provide recommendations and draft material for your approval. No commitment on your behalf without your written approval except routine consultant coordination within agreed scope.

## Professional indemnity

HCS holds professional indemnity insurance with QBE Australia Ltd, policy PI-NSW-2026-44821, limit $5,000,000 any one claim, period 1 July 2025 to 30 June 2026. Certificate available on request.

## Programme

We will prepare a master programme aligned to the Project Management Plan. Target DA lodgement: **September 2026**, subject to due diligence completion and brief sign-off.

## Execution

Please sign and return one copy. Works commence on receipt of signed engagement and Stage 1 fee invoice.

Yours sincerely,

**Amelia Harrison**
Director, Registered Architect NSW #8432
Harrison Clarke Studio Pty Ltd
